review_method: Manual statement-level review, topic-split subagent validity checks, and script side-effect inspection before integration. Contributed scripts were not executed locally in this pass.

prs.author: AllenGrahamHart
prs.title: L2: codegree theorem for the interleaved-list saving
prs.validity: The codegree decomposition and two-regime recursion are valid. The exponent saving still needs an L1-family tail-list input.

prs.author: AllenGrahamHart
prs.title: L1: prove full-list Johnson base region
prs.validity: Useful proof-program material and standard Johnson-region components. It does not prove the full L1 local limit.

prs.author: AllenGrahamHart
prs.title: M1: strict264 audit (agreement 264 endpoint, slack-8 two-ended)
prs.validity: The arithmetic that seven retained slopes over F_17^32 clear 2^-128 is correct. The exact retained-slope proof is not supplied, so this remains a target/audit.

prs.author: AllenGrahamHart
prs.title: M1: add quotient occupancy theorem
prs.validity: Exact fiber-occupancy and whole-fiber exchange formulas are valid combinatorial ledgers.

prs.author: AllenGrahamHart
prs.title: F1: add resonance graph-gate verifier
prs.validity: Valid restricted graph-gate audit. Wording was softened from certificate language to audit language.

prs.author: scottdhughes
prs.title: L1: add centered Krawtchouk baseline-cancellation route cut
prs.validity: Useful route cut. The baseline transform must use full-rank subsets or p^{-rank(T)} rather than a uniform p^{-s} baseline.

prs.author: AllenGrahamHart
prs.title: M2: add common code-line residual budget
prs.validity: Valid support-wise MDS residual-budget lemma. Sharpness needs unused residual coordinates kept non-common-zero, which the note does.

prs.author: AllenGrahamHart
prs.title: A0: split deep-point cap dependency
prs.status: PROVED local route / AUDIT import split
prs.validity: The deep-point/simple-pole route gives a CS25-free proof path for the headline MCA cap under Paper D hypotheses. CA/list claims still need the CS25 import audit.

prs.author: AllenGrahamHart
prs.title: L2: sharp-constant falsification exact Quot_rem_mu + stress
prs.validity: Useful falsification/stress evidence for sharp constants. No theorem promotion.

prs.author: AllenGrahamHart
prs.title: L1 independent audit / M1-L1 reserve connection
prs.validity: Consistent with existing L1/M1 reserve framing; audit only.

prs.author: AllenGrahamHart
prs.title: F1: prove syndrome-pencil normal form
prs.status: PROVED normal form / NOT F1 theorem
prs.validity: Valid Hankel-pencil incidence and noncontainment normal form. Added explicit finite-slope and 0<=j<=r hypotheses.

prs.author: scottdhughes
prs.title: L1: add large-domain mixed-Weil energy floor
prs.validity: Potentially useful route cut, but conditional until the mixed Kummer-Artin-Schreier Weil citation and constant are checked. Script shells to Sage and was not run.
